title: Origami pinwheel
chartDefinition: origamiFoldDiagram — pinwheel from a square: steps 1-6, valley and mountain folds only, no inside-reverse or sink manoeuvres
sources: Kindergarten Gifts and Occupations literature — pre-1928 Fröbel tradition; the pinwheel is among the canonical Fröbel folds
notes: A classic four-bladed pinwheel from one 15 cm square. Valley folds only to diagonal, then intermediate fold positions that form the blade shape. The result fans into a flat pinwheel. Can be mounted on a stick pin for display. All folds are valley folds at standard angles — well within v1 renderer capability.
